name: Video Ad Factory
description: Script, storyboard, and render short-form video ads with automatic voiceover and b-roll composition. Powered by AI video models (Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Kling 3.0, Seedance 2.0) via the Arcads API.

integrations.description: Publish finished ads to Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram
Store rendered video assets, reference images, and character sheets
Notify team when new ad variants are ready for review
